sn21.9:1.1: Sāvatthiyaṁ vihārati. Atha kho āyasmā tisso bhagavato pitucchāputto yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi dukkhī dummano assūni pavattayamāno. Atha kho bhagavā āyasmantaṁ tissaṁ etadavoca:
sn21.9:1.2: "Kiṁ nu kho tvaṁ, tissa, ekamantaṁ nisinno dukkhī dummano assūni pavattayamāno"ti?
sn21.9:1.3: "Tathā hi pana maṁ, bhante, bhikkhū samantā vācāyasannitodakena sañjambharimakaṁsū"ti.
sn21.9:2.2: "Tathāhi pana tvaṁ, tissa, vattā no ca vacanakkhamo; na kho te taṁ, tissa, patirūpaṁ kulaputtassa saddhā agārasmā anagāriyaṁ pabbajitassa, yaṁ tvaṁ vattā no ca vacanakkhamo. Etaṁ kho te, tissa, patirūpaṁ kulaputtassa saddhā agārasmā anagāriyaṁ pabbajitassa: ‘Yaṁ tvaṁ vattā ca assa vacanakkhamo cā’"ti.
sn21.9:2.3: Idamavoca bhagavā. Idaṁ vatvāna sugato athāparaṁ etadavoca satthā:
sn21.9:2.4:
"Kiṁ nu kujjhasi mā kujjhi,
Akkodho tissa te varaṁ;
Kodhamānamakkhavinayatthañhi,
Tissa brahmacariyaṁ vussatī"ti.
Navamaṁ.
